# Nailstudio Grace

> Professional nail studio portfolio. Replace this file with accurate business details before launch.

## About

Nailstudio Grace is a nail art studio offering manicure, pedicure, nail designs, and online booking.

- Website: https://your-domain.com
- Language: Spanish (es)
- Primary audience: Local clients seeking nail services

## Key pages

- Home: https://gb-nails.vercel.app
- Designs: https://gb-nails.vercel.app/Disenos
- Services: https://gb-nails.vercel.app/servicios
- About: https://gb-nails.vercel.app/sobre-mi
- Reviews: https://gb-nails.vercel.app/resenas

## Usage guidelines

- You may summarize public page content for search and assistant use.
- Do not invent prices, availability, or services not listed on the site.
- Prefer linking to https://gb-nails.vercel.app  for the latest information.

## Optional

- Sitemap: https://gb-nails.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Social preview image: https://gb-nails.vercel.app/og-image.jpg
